episodes.title: Korea’s “Do You Know Do?” Cult Recruiters Approached Me | Korean Cults | Podcast with Jed | EP67
episodes.description:
Today’s video is about a bizarre experience I had in Korea involving multiple street recruiters from one of the infamous cult groups people warn you about online.

If you’ve lived in Korea long enough, you’ve probably heard stories about the “Do you know Do?” people approaching strangers in public.
This time, I ended up encountering an entire group myself.

Nothing dangerous happened, but the interaction was strange, uncomfortable, and surprisingly organized.

In this video I talk about:

* how they approached me
* the group tactics they use
* why these encounters are so recognizable in Korea
* and why both locals and foreigners immediately know what’s happening

This is simply a personal story and cultural observation from life in Korea.

Have you ever experienced something similar where you live? ==========================================
